summary: Independent verification of Live telemetry + Game Profiles features. Created pytest suite (9 tests) covering: telemetry POST auth (401 w/o token), telemetry ingest+live=true, sample append & 60-sample cap, /api/profiles/templates (5 templates + 26 tweaks catalog), profiles CRUD with invalid tweak filtering (xxx dropped), agent script injection with $script:PROFILE ids for tpl_valorant, empty profile @() case, and monitor mode (Get-TelemetrySample/Send-Telemetry present, $MODE='monitor'). All 9 backend tests PASS. Frontend UI tested end-to-end via Playwright on the public preview URL: admin login OK, /app/live shows all 8 stat cards + live-status + monitor-cmd/monitor-copy, telemetry values from POST propagate to UI (stat-cpu shows 2%), chart renders. /app/profiles shows all 5 preset cards (profile-tpl_*), new-profile-btn opens form, tweak-opt-*, name input + save creates custom profile (verified in 'I tuoi profili'), delete works, nav-live and nav-profiles sidebar entries render.
critical_code_review_comments: Live page live-status will only show LIVE if telemetry POST happened <12s ago; expected behavior but ensure the PowerShell agent actually pings every 2s in production (verified in ps_agent monitor branch).

In /api/agent/script, ids are joined into a PS literal via single-quote escape only (replace("'", '')). Since ids are filtered against _VALID_IDS or template constants, injection risk is minimal; still, this is by-design and safe today.
seed_data_creation: Test profile TEST_UI_Profile created and deleted via UI; TEST_apex created and deleted via API. Telemetry samples posted (cleaned by 60-sample cap).
context_for_next_testing_agent: test_live_profiles.py covers telemetry + profiles CRUD + script injection. Reusable regression suite. Playwright flow: login admin -> nav-live/nav-profiles -> stats/preset cards + create/delete profile.
